prompt.businessDescription: Coordinates medical equipment delivery, pickup, cleaning status, warehouse movement, and hospital service requests across multiple regions.
prompt.applicationNeeds: Build an internal operations app with dispatch dashboard, service tickets, pickup/delivery workflows, warehouse inventory status, hospital account views, technician task assignments, approvals for urgent replacements, audit logs, role-based access, and reporting.

constraints.environment: local-first with promotion to staging and production

customerProfile.name: Northstar Medical Logistics
customerProfile.tenancy: multi-tenant ready with tenant-scoped business entities

branding.logoTreatment: Northstar monogram with a compass-star accent

spec.appPurpose: Internal operations app for dispatch, service tickets, inventory, approvals, and reporting.
spec.summary: Northstar Medical Logistics needs an internal enterprise app built from reusable modules, domain packs, and typed contracts.

identityAndAccess.authStrategy: Enterprise SSO or local admin bootstrap with later IdP cutover
identityAndAccess.tenantIsolation: Tenant-scoped rows, tenant-aware APIs, and no cross-tenant data access by default
leastPrivilegeNotes: Approval rights are separated from general operational access
identityAndAccess.approvalPolicy: Irreversible workflow actions require explicit approval plus audit capture

assumptions: Generated apps own their own business records.

blueprint.persistenceOwnership: Generated customer apps own their own business records, workflow outcomes, and approval decisions.

summary: Workflow interactions and integration seams are coherent, but they still need explicit host-owned ingress boundaries and downstream approval controls.

root.name: AutoMindLab Host
root.summary: Ran a bounded council review using 3 seat(s) and 4 delegated check(s).

recommendations.title: Keep the council output advisory and operator-visible
recommendations.rationale: The council runtime helps structure judgment, but it should not silently commit downstream state.

children.name: Nikola Tesla
children.summary: Workflow interactions and integration seams are coherent, but they still need explicit host-owned ingress boundaries and downstream approval controls.

delegationPlan.reason: Workflow interactions and integration seams are coherent, but they still need explicit host-owned ingress boundaries and downstream approval controls.

capabilityMatrix.label: Structured council review
capabilityMatrix.notes: The host can run a bounded multi-seat review with nested delegates and typed output.

capabilityMatrix.label: General-purpose coding agent parity
capabilityMatrix.notes: The factory now has a constrained advisory council runtime, not full Codex feature parity.

reasons: The spec is intentionally constrained and typed, but some customer deployment decisions remain open.
missingContext: Select the customer identity provider and login method for production deployment.
operatorQuestions: Select the customer identity provider and login method for production deployment.
